items.claim: Anna Malisano is a significantly better striker than Dioni Babosa.
items.quote: She is a better striker than Da Babusa I think by far.

items.claim: Anna Malisano's grappling was exposed in her Ultimate Fighter loss.
items.quote: we have seen Melisona's grappling exposed pretty badly in that ultimate fighter fight.

items.claim: Dioni Babosa has a judo background and will look to throw her opponent rather than wrestle.
items.quote: She's got that judo background so she's not really going to be wrestling. She's going to be looking to throw her.

items.claim: Alvin Hines failed a drug test for three different anabolic steroids.
items.quote: I think he failed the drug test for three different anabolics.

items.claim: Alvin Hines is coming off a one-year suspension for PED use.
items.quote: I do worry about the fact that Hines is coming off a one-year suspension.

items.claim: RJ Harris is a better wrestler/grappler than he is a striker.
items.quote: I think R.J. Harris, if anything, is a lot better of a wrestler grappler than he is necessarily as a striker.

items.claim: RJ Harris does not use his 80-inch reach effectively and lacks good defensive skills.
items.quote: he doesn't necessarily use that reach all that well. He doesn't really have good defense.

items.claim: Alden Corer's best attribute is his boxing.
items.quote: what I think he's best at is the boxing.

items.claim: Alden Corer has defended takedowns against better wrestlers than Stewart Nickel.
items.quote: I've seen Corer defend takedowns against better wrestlers in my opinion than Nickel.

items.claim: Stewart Nickel has poor striking skills.
items.quote: I just don't like his striking at all.

items.claim: Levi Rodriguez Jr. has never been tested against a good wrestler.
items.quote: Levi Rodriguez Junior's never really been tested against a good wrestler in his career.

items.claim: Sio Kuong is a former Sambo world champion.
items.quote: He is the first ever Sambbo world champion out of Korea.

items.claim: John Paul Leosyani is undersized for the welterweight division.
items.quote: I still do think he's a bit undized for welterweight.

items.claim: Austin Bashy is undersized for the featherweight division.
items.quote: I think he's way too small for 145 lb.

items.claim: Jose Delgado has not shown elite takedown defense.
items.quote: He hasn't necessarily shown elite takedown defense
